debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝³ : LinearOrder ι
E : Type u_4
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : InfSet ι
inst✝ : Bot ι
X : ι → Ω → E
t : ι
K : ℝ
ω : Ω
⊢ ⨆ s, ⨆ (_ : s ≤ t), ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤
    K +
      {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ ↑t}.indicator
        (fun ω => ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω

    have : s < (τ ω).untopA := by rwa [WithTop.untopA_eq_untop h_top, ← WithTop.coe_lt_coe, ← not_le]
    exact (not_le.mp fun m ↦ this.not_le (WithTop.untopA_le_iff.mpr (hittingAfter_le ⟨bot_le, m⟩))).le

  · have h_le : τ ≤ u := not_lt.mp h
    have h_ne : τ ≠ ⊤ := (h_le.trans_lt (WithTop.coe_lt_top u)).ne
    have h_u : u = τ.untopA := le_antisymm (min_le_right _ _) (WithTop.untopA_le_iff h_ne |>.mpr h_le)
    have hK : 0 ≤ K := by
      by_cases hL : ∃ t, ⊥ ≤ t ∧ ‖X t ω‖ ≥ K
      · obtain ⟨t, -, ht⟩ := hL; exact (norm_nonneg (X t ω)).trans' ht
      · exfalso; simp [hittingAfter, hL] at h_ne
    rw [h_u, Set.indicator_apply, if_pos (h_le.trans (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hs))]
    exact le_add_of_nonneg_left hK

  set τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  apply iSup₂_le
  intro s hs
  rw [stoppedProcess_apply]
  split_ifs with h
  · have h_τ_le_t : τ ω ≤ t := h.trans hs
    simp only [h_τ_le_t, Set.indicator_of_mem, Set.mem_setOf_eq, stoppedValue]
    refine le_add_of_nonneg_left ?_
    obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := (NoMaxOrder.to_noMaxOrder ι).exists_gt t
    have : ‖X (min s (τ ω)) ω‖ < K ∨ ∃ u, τ ω ≤ u ∧ ‖X u ω‖ ≥ K := by
      by_cases hK : ∃ u, ‖X u ω‖ ≥ K
      · exact Or.inr (by obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := hK; exact ⟨u, bot_le.trans (Inf_le ⟨bot_le, hu⟩).le, hu⟩)
      · exact Or.inl (not_exists.mp hK (min s (τ ω)))
    exact le_of_not_lt (fun hK ↦ not_le.mpr hK ((norm_nonneg _).trans (le_of_not_lt (fun hlt ↦ h (Inf_le ⟨bot_le, le_of_lt hlt⟩)))))
  · have hle : ‖X s ω‖ ≤ K := le_of_not_lt (fun hlt ↦ h (Inf_le ⟨bot_le, le_of_lt hlt⟩))
    exact hle.trans (le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) _))

by
  set τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  refine iSup_le fun s ↦ iSup_le fun hst ↦ ?_
  by_cases h : τ ω ≤ t
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_mem h]
    have h_top : τ ω ≠ ⊤ := ne_top_of_le_ne_top (WithTop.coe_ne_top t) h
    have h_min : (min (s : WithTop ι) (τ ω)).untopA = min s (τ ω).untopA := by
      rw [← WithTop.coe_min, WithTop.untopA_coe, WithTop.coe_untopA h_top]
    rw [h_min]
    by_cases hs : s < (τ ω).untopA
    · rw [min_eq_left hs.le]
      have : (s : WithTop ι) < τ ω := by rwa [WithTop.coe_lt_coe, ← WithTop.coe_untopA h_top]
      have : ‖X s ω‖ ≤ K := by
        by_contra! hge; exact not_le.mpr this (Inf_le ⟨bot_le, hge⟩)
      exact this.trans (le_add_of_nonneg_right (norm_nonneg _))
    · rw [min_eq_right (not_lt.mp hs), stoppedValue]
      exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (by
        have : τ ω ≠ ⊤ := ne_top_of_le_ne_top (WithTop.coe_ne_top t) h
        obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := (WithTop.ne_top_iff_exists).mp this
        have : u ∈ {t | ‖X t ω‖ ≥ K} := (Inf_mem (Set.nonempty_of_mem (⟨bot_le, (Inf_le_iff.mp (le_refl (τ ω)) ⟨bot_le, (by sorry)⟩ (by sorry))).1⟩ : ∃ u, ‖X u ω‖ ≥ K))).1
        exact (norm_nonneg _).trans_le (by sorry))
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_not_mem h, add_zero]
    have : (s : WithTop ι) < τ ω := lt_of_le_of_lt (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hst) (not_le.mp h)
    have : (min (s : WithTop ι) (τ ω)).untopA = s := by
      rw [min_eq_left this.le, WithTop.untopA_coe]
    rw [this]
    by_contra! hge; exact not_le.mpr this (Inf_le ⟨bot_le, hge⟩)

  apply iSup₂_le; intro s hs

  let τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥

    refine le_of_not_gt (fun hK ↦ ?_)

    exact hτs.not_lt (iInf_lt_iff.mpr ⟨s, h_mem, WithTop.coe_lt_coe.mpr (lt_add_one s)⟩)
  · rw [inf_eq_left.mpr (le_of_not_ge hτs), WithTop.untopA_coe]
    refine (le_of_not_gt fun h ↦ hτs (iInf_le _ ⟨bot_le, h.le⟩)).trans ?_
    exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) _)

  apply iSup₂_le; intro s hs
  let τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  by_cases hτs : τ ω ≤ s

  intro ω
  set τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  refine iSup_le fun s => iSup_le fun hst => ?_
  rw [stoppedProcess_apply]
  cases' lt_or_le (↑s : WithTop ι) (τ ω) with h h
  · rw [min_eq_left h.le, WithTop.untopA_coe]
    refine (not_le.mp (not_mem_of_lt_hittingAfter h)).le.trans ?_
    exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ => norm_nonneg _) _)
  · have h_le_t : τ ω ≤ ↑t := h.trans (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hst)
    rw [min_eq_right h, Set.indicator_of_mem h_le_t]
    simp only [stoppedValue, le_add_iff_nonneg_left]
    exact le_of_not_lt (fun hK => (not_le.mpr hK) (norm_nonneg _))

  rcases le_total (τ ω) (s : WithTop ι) with h | h

    · refine (le_of_not_lt (fun h_gt ↦ ?_)).trans (le_add_of_nonneg_right (norm_nonneg _))
      exact h.not_lt (le_hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ h_gt.le (lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le h))
    · refine le_of_not_lt (fun h_gt ↦ h.not_lt ?_)
      exact le_hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ h_gt.le (lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le h)

  apply iSup_le; intro s; apply iSup_le; intro hst

      exact this.le.trans (le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) _))
    · have : s = ⊥ := bot_unique (not_lt.mp hb)
      rw [this]
      exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) _)

by
  set τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  refine iSup₂_le (fun s hs ↦ ?_)
  rw [stoppedProcess_apply]
  by_cases h : τ ω ≤ (s : WithTop ι)
  · rw [min_eq_right h]
    have hτt : τ ω ≤ (t : WithTop ι) := h.trans hs
    simp only [hτt, Set.indicator_of_mem, mem_setOf_eq, stoppedValue, WithTop.untopA_coe]
    exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (le_of_not_lt fun hK ↦
      not_le_of_gt (hittingAfter_le (by simpa using hK.le)) bot_le)
  · rw [min_eq_left (le_of_not_le h)]
    have h_not_mem := not_mem_of_lt_hittingAfter (lt_of_not_le h) (le_refl ⊥)
    simp only [Set.mem_Ici, not_le] at h_not_mem
    exact h_not_mem.le.trans (le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) _))

  set τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  refine iSup_le fun s ↦ iSup_le fun hst ↦ ?_
  rw [stoppedProcess_apply]
  if h : τ ω ≤ (s : WithTop ι) then
    have h_le_t : τ ω ≤ (t : WithTop ι) := h.trans (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hst)
    simp [h, h_le_t, stoppedValue]
    exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (norm_nonneg _)
  else
    simp only [h, Set.indicator_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq, if_false, min_eq_left (le_of_not_ge h),
      WithTop.untopA_coe]
    have h_lt : ‖X s ω‖ < K := by
      rw [not_le] at h
      simpa using lt_hittingAfter h bot_le
    exact h_lt.le.trans (le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ => norm_nonneg _) _))

  apply iSup₂_le; intro s hs

  rw [stoppedProcess_apply]
  by_cases h_le : H ω ≤ s
  · have hHt : H ω ≤ t := h_le.trans hs
    rw [inf_eq_right.mpr (h_le.trans (by simp)), Set.indicator_of_mem hHt]
    exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (norm_nonneg _)
  · rw [inf_eq_left.mpr (le_of_lt (not_le.mp h_le)), WithTop.untopA_coe]
    refine le_trans ?_ (le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) _))
    by_cases h_bot : s = ⊥
    · rw [h_bot]
      refine le_of_not_lt (fun h_norm ↦ ?_)
      have : H ω = ⊥ := (hittingAfter_le_bot_iff (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω).mpr h_norm.le
      exact h_le (this.le.trans bot_le)
    · exact le_of_not_lt (fun h_norm ↦ (not_le.mp h_le).not_le (CSInf_le (by simp)
        ⟨lt_of_le_of_ne bot_le (Ne.symm h_bot), h_norm.le⟩))

by
  refine iSup_le (fun s ↦ iSup_le (fun hst ↦ ?_))
  set τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  rw [stoppedProcess_apply]
  by_cases h : τ ω ≤ s
  · have ht : τ ω ≤ t := h.trans (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hst)
    rw [min_eq_right (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mp h), Set.indicator_of_mem ht, WithTop.untopA_eq_untop (ne_top_of_le ht)]
    exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (le_trans (le_refl _) (norm_nonneg _))
  · rw [min_eq_left (le_of_not_ge (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mp.mt h))]
    have hlt : (s : WithTop ι) < τ ω := lt_of_not_ge h
    rw [lt_hittingAfter_iff] at hlt
    exact (not_le.mp (not_mem_Ici.mp (hlt s (by simp)))).le.trans (le_add_of_nonneg_right (Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) _))
